Name: Attack
Description: Base attack. Deals 1 damage at range 1 with diagonals included. Cooldown 1.

Name: Attack
Description: Base attack. Deals 1 damage at range 1 with diagonals included. Cooldown 1.

Name: Strike
Description: Starting strike card. Deals 2 damage at orthogonal range 1. Cooldown 1.

Name: Dash I
Description: Free after any card. Move orthogonally up to 2 tiles. Cannot target an obstacle. Cooldown 2.

Name: Dash II
Description: Free after any card. Move orthogonally up to 2 tiles. Cannot target an obstacle. Cooldown 2.

Name: Dash III
Description: Free after any card. Move orthogonally up to 2 tiles. Cannot target an obstacle. Cooldown 1.

Name: Vortex I
Description: Ranged pull. Select a tile at range 2 with diagonals included then pull up to 2 monsters at distance 1 from it. Cooldown 2.

Name: Power Strike I
Description: Free after shield break. Deals 3 damage at orthogonal range 1. Cooldown 2.

Name: Power Strike II
Description: Free after shield break. Deals 3 damage at orthogonal range 1 then pushes 1 tile. Cooldown 2.

Name: Power Strike III
Description: Free after shield break. Deals 4 damage at orthogonal range 1 then pushes 1 tile. Cooldown 2.

Name: Point Blank I
Description: Free after push. Deals 1 ranged damage at Chebyshev range 1 to 2 then pushes 1 tile. Cooldown 2.

Name: Point Blank II
Description: Free after push. Deals 2 ranged damage at Chebyshev range 1 to 2 then pushes 1 tile. Cooldown 2.

Name: Point Blank III
Description: Free after push. Deals 3 ranged damage at Chebyshev range 1 to 2 then pushes 2 tiles. Cooldown 2.
